text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp, a chance for racers to improve
their skills, begins today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio can't seem to hide her excitement at
being somewhere new.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch over her to make sure she doesn't overdo
it... It's the beginning of a thrilling summer camp!
